ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc And Mtn For Hearing Date For Default Judgment Prove Up
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Brian Foster Kram, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, T944 Market Associates, LLC.
Aine O'Connell sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Scott Kim and S.K. Footwear, Inc.
Defult of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-100 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulte Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $88,186.00
Attorney's Fees: $9,750.00
Costs: $500.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $98,436.00
Judgment signed in open court.
